title: Research Log
description: A structured record of research activity — what was searched, where, with what outcome — supporting the Genealogical Proof Standard's reasonably exhaustive search. ID comes from the map key in the parent structure.

objective.description: The specific question this research log is investigating (e.g., 'Locate Jane Webb in 1860 census to confirm birthplace')

date.description: Date or date range when the log entry was created or last updated

researcher.description: Name of the researcher who created or owns this log entry

status.description: Current status of the research objective — value should exist in the research_status_types vocabulary

searches.description: Individual searches performed against the objective

conclusions.description: Conclusions or summary the researcher drew from the searches

notes.description: General notes about the research log entry

ResearchLogSearch.description: A single search performed as part of the research objective

repository.description: Reference to a Repository entity where the search was performed

collection.description: Free-form name of the collection or database searched (e.g., 'United States, Census, 1860')

search_terms.description: Free-form record of the search terms or strategy used

result.description: Outcome of the search — value should exist in the search_result_types vocabulary

citation.description: Reference to a Citation entity recording the located evidence

media.description: References to Media entities — e.g. screenshots of the search results page
